seoTitle: How to Find Your Freshdesk API Key
metaDescription: Learn where to locate your Freshdesk API key so you can authenticate integrations and custom scripts securely.
intro: If you're setting up an integration or script that talks to Freshdesk, you'll need your API key to authenticate. This guide shows exactly where to find it in your account.

steps.heading: Sign in to Freshdesk
steps.body: Log in with the account you want the API key for.

steps.heading: Open your profile settings
steps.body: Click your avatar or name in the top corner to access your profile.

steps.heading: View the API key field
steps.body: Scroll to the section showing your API key, usually near your contact details.

steps.heading: Copy the key for use
steps.body: Copy the key and paste it into the integration or script that needs it, keeping it private.

faq.question: Is the API key visible right away in my profile?
faq.answer: Yes, once you navigate to your profile settings, the API key is typically displayed or revealed with a click.

faq.question: Can I have more than one API key?
faq.answer: Each user account generally has a single API key tied to it, rather than multiple keys.

faq.question: What if I can't find the API key section?
faq.answer: Check that you're viewing your own profile settings and not a different admin page, since the key is user-specific.

faq.question: Can I regenerate the key if needed?
faq.answer: Yes, Freshdesk typically allows you to regenerate your API key from the same profile page.
